name: Ravenous Hydra

passives.name: Cleave
passives.effects: Basic attacks [[on-hit]] deal {{as|{{rd|40% AD|20% AD}}|ad}} {{as|physical damage}} to other enemies in a {{tip|cr|icononly = true}} 350 radius centered around the target. This damage benefits from {{as|{{sti|life steal}}}} at 100% effectiveness.

active.name: Ravenous Crescent
active.effects: Deal {{as|80% AD}} {{as|physical damage}} to enemies within a {{tip|cr|icononly = true}} 450 radius in front of you. This damage benefits from {{as|{{sti|life steal}}}} at 100% effectiveness.

effects_structured.raw: Basic attacks deal 40% (20% for ranged) AD physical damage to other enemies in a 350 radius around the target.
Cleave damage benefits from lifesteal at 100% effectiveness.
Active: Deal 80% AD physical damage to enemies in a 450 radius in front of you.
Active damage benefits from lifesteal at 100% effectiveness.

simpleDescription: Melee attacks hit nearby enemies, dealing damage and restoring Health

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Ravenous Hydra is modeled as sustained fighter wave-clear where both passive cleave and active crescent preserve full lifesteal conversion from physical damage dealt.
Cleave damage differs for melee vs ranged (40% vs 20% AD).
Wave 115 (2026-02-24): Added page-verified 10-second active cooldown metadata for Ravenous Crescent while preserving lifesteal-at-full-effectiveness semantics on active and passive cleave branches.

sources.used_for: local ingestion snapshot used during structured effect authoring

sources.used_for: baseline item identity, stat block, and raw effect text

sources.used_for: secondary validation against canonical static item data mirror
